properties.name: Rocky Whispers
properties.description:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Nature DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals  Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

properties.name: Dolly Rush
properties.description: Hops on Mr. Dolly and rams the target to deal Nature DMG. If the target has Corrosion, then consume the Corrosion and apply Physical Susceptibility and Arts Susceptibility to the target.

properties.name: Eruption Column
properties.description: Controlled operator Final Strike on enemy with no Vulnerability or Arts Infliction

properties.name: Wooly Party
properties.description: Ardelia enters a mobile channeling state and summons the aid of Mr. Dolly. Multiple copies of Mr. Dolly are thrown in random directions. Each copy deals Nature DMG when hitting the enemy. Each enemy can only take 1 damaging hit every s.

properties.name: Rocky Whispers (Finisher)
properties.description: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

properties.name: Rocky Whispers (Dive)
properties.description: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies.
